revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]

talk:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/wiki.phtml?title=User_talk:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}&action=edit§ion=new contribs]]{{middot}}[[Special:DeletedContributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|deleted page moves]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log/newusers|user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} user creation]{{middot}}[[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|block user]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log]{{middot}}[https://supercount.toolforge.org/index.php?user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}&project=en.wikipedia count]{{middot}}[https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=users&usprop=editcount&format=xml&ususers={{{{{subst|}}}urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}} total]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}} logs]{{middot}}{{User-multi/link|es|user={{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}{{middot}}[[Special:Emailuser/{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}|email]] | [{{fullurl:Special:Listusers|limit=1&username={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} lu]{{middot}}{{#ifexist: Wikipedia:Requests for adminship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|[[Special:Prefixindex/Wikipedia:Requests for adminship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfas]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for bureaucratship/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfb]]|[[{{SITENAME}}:Requests for bureaucratship#{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|rfb]]}}{{#if:{{{ban|}}}| [[{{SITENAME}}:List of banned
